title: World of Color-BTA
description: A mod for Better Than Adventure that backports features from the 1.12 World of Color update
body:
A mod for Better Than Adventure that backports features from the 1.12 World of Color update
The first of many mods that will bring features from newer versions of minecraft, starting with 1.12!

**Features**
- Concrete powder, crafted with 1 dye and 4 sand and gravel
- Concrete, made from getting concrete powder wet
- Seats and Beds now have colored variants

**Requires**
- BTA 7.3
- Halplibe

**Instructions**
- Check the BTA! wiki page about modding

**Credits**
- LukeisStuff - Creator

- Beta Continuum, Golden Days  - Textures
